name: page1_button_event_minimal
verified_behavior: get p1title.txt returns PAGE1 on runtime page 0
get back0.txt returns BACK on runtime page 0
click back0,1 then click back0,0 triggers the release event
sendme returns 1 after BACK release, proving the event jumped to seed 0.pa/page0
get back0.txt returns invalid_reference after the jump
get page0.bco returns 65535 after the jump
notes: The recovered case31 page layout uses inverted runtime page ids: page 0 selects generated page1, while page 1 selects seed page0.
For this minimal BACK button, the correct event command is therefore page 1, not page 0.
The earlier 2026-05-14 live build with event page 0 stayed on runtime page 0 and was intentionally superseded by this fixed build.
